title: Multi-layer Transport Network Slicing with Hard and Soft Isolation
author: Alcalá, A.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: We validate the deployment of isolated transport network slices in IP over DWDM network. To this end, an isolated transport network slice is deployed using multi-layer isolation mechanisms based on OpenConfig and ONF Transport API.
steps_raw: We validate the deployment of isolated transport network slices in IP over DWDM network. To this end, an isolated transport network slice is deployed using multi-layer isolation mechanisms based on OpenConfig and ONF Transport API.
